name: Veal with Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of chicken soup (1 3/4 cup Water)
recipeInstructions:
Veal: Roll veal in flour and brown quickly in butter. Add salt, pepper, and water; simmer for 30 minutes. Meanwhile, slowly cook onion in butter. Pour the veal into a 9" x 13" casserole; arrange onion on top. In the veal skillet, bring the soup and water to a boil and pour over veal.
Dumplings: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Mix together first five dumpling ingredients. Stir in oil and milk. Mix melted butter and breadcrumbs, roll tablespoons of batter into breadcrumb mixture and place on top of veal. Bake for 20 minutes.
Combine and heat the sauce ingredients. Pass the sauce separately to be poured over dumplings and veal.
